questions.question: Ek naye salon ke liye sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Business plan banana

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi naye business ke liye, sabse pehla step ek detailed business plan banana hota hai jo goals, strategies aur financial projections define karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein cross-contamination rokne ka sabse effective tareeka kya hai?

options.A: Har client ke baad tools ko sterilize karna
options.B: Ek hi towel sabhi clients ke liye use karna
options.D: Floor ko din mein ek baar saaf karna

questions.explanation: Har client ke baad tools ko sterilize karna ya dispose karna cross-contamination rokne ka sabse effective tareeka hai, jisse hygiene maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Salon mein reception area ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Client welcome aur appointments manage karna

questions.explanation: Reception area clients ko welcome karne, unki appointments manage karne aur unhe comfortable feel karwane ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Salon ke liye location choose karte waqt kis factor ko sabse zyada importance deni chahiye?

options.B: Parking ki availability aur visibility
options.D: Pados mein sirf residential area ho

questions.explanation: Ek acchi location jahan parking available ho aur salon visible ho, clients ko attract karne mein help karti hai aur business ke liye crucial hoti hai.

questions.question: Kis type ka lighting salon ke working stations ke liye best hota hai?

options.B: Bright, natural daylight equivalent light

questions.explanation: Bright, natural daylight equivalent light stylists ko colours aur details sahi se dekhne mein madad karti hai, jo services ki quality ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Salon mein electrical safety maintain karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Water ke paas electrical appliances use karna

questions.explanation: Broken plugs aur damaged wiring ko turant repair karwana ya replace karna electrical hazards se bachne ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Salon ke waiting area mein clients ko comfortable rakhne ke liye kya provide karna chahiye?

options.B: Comfortable seating, current magazines, Wi-Fi, refreshments

questions.explanation: Comfortable seating, current magazines, Wi-Fi aur refreshments provide karne se clients waiting area mein relax feel karte hain aur unka experience enhance hota hai.

questions.question: Salon mein waste management ka kya benefit hai?

options.B: Environment ko protect karna aur hygiene maintain karna

questions.explanation: Proper waste management environment ko protect karta hai aur salon mein ek clean aur hygienic environment maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Ek salon ke interior design mein colour scheme ka kya role hota hai?

options.B: Salon ke brand identity ko reflect karna aur mood set karna

questions.explanation: Colour scheme salon ke brand identity ko reflect karti hai aur clients ke liye ek welcoming aur relaxing ya energizing mood set karti hai.

questions.question: Salon equipment ki regular maintenance kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf naya equipment khareedne ke liye
options.B: Equipment ki longevity badhane aur safety ensure karne ke liye
options.D: Staff ko extra kaam dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular maintenance se equipment ki life badhti hai, breakdowns kam hote hain aur staff aur clients ki safety ensure hoti hai.

questions.question: Salon ke liye water supply aur drainage system ki planning mein kya important hai?

options.B: Adequate water pressure, hot water supply aur efficient drainage

questions.explanation: Adequate water pressure, continuous hot water supply aur efficient drainage salon operations ke liye essential hain, especially for hair services.

questions.question: Salon mein ventilation system ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Sirf AC ki zaroorat hoti hai
options.B: Chemical fumes ko remove karna aur fresh air maintain karna

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation chemical fumes aur odours ko remove karta hai, aur salon mein fresh air maintain karta hai, jo staff aur clients ke health ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Salon mein appointment scheduling software use karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Bookings ko streamline karna aur no-shows kam karna
options.D: Sirf bade salons ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Appointment scheduling software bookings ko streamline karta hai, reminders bhejta hai, jisse no-shows kam hote hain aur efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Salon ke layout design karte waqt kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Client flow, staff efficiency aur privacy zones

questions.explanation: Ek accha layout client flow ko optimize karta hai, staff ki efficiency badhata hai aur certain services ke liye privacy provide karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein emergency exits aur fire safety equipment ka hona kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Staff aur clients ki safety ensure karne ke liye
options.D: Extra space occupy karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Emergency exits aur fire safety equipment staff aur clients ki safety ke liye crucial hain, especially in unforeseen situations like fire.

questions.question: Salon mein background music ka kya role hai?

options.B: Relaxing atmosphere create karna
options.D: Sirf staff ke entertainment ke liye

questions.explanation: Soft aur soothing background music salon mein ek relaxing aur pleasant atmosphere create karta hai, jo client experience ko enhance karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein water and electricity bill kam karne ke liye kya steps le sakte hain?

options.B: Energy-efficient appliances use karna aur water-saving fixtures lagana
options.D: Staff ko extra appliances use karne dena

questions.explanation: Energy-efficient appliances aur water-saving fixtures use karne se operating costs kam hote hain aur resources ka efficient use hota hai.

questions.question: Ek acchi salon team banane ke liye sabse important factor kya hai?

options.B: Teamwork aur communication skills
options.D: Ek hi tarah ke skills wale log

questions.explanation: Ek strong team ke liye teamwork aur effective communication skills bahut zaroori hain, taaki sab milkar kaam kar sakein.

questions.question: Staff training kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Skills enhance karne aur naye trends sikhane ke liye
options.C: Staff ko busy rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular training se staff ke skills improve hote hain, woh naye trends aur techniques seekhte hain, jisse service quality badhti hai.

questions.question: Employee motivation ke liye kya effective tareeka hai?

options.B: Performance-based incentives aur recognition

questions.explanation: Performance-based incentives aur recognition employees ko motivate karte hain aur unhe better perform karne ke liye encourage karte hain.

questions.question: Staff schedule banate waqt kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Client demand, staff availability aur fair distribution of work
options.D: Ek hi employee ko saare shifts

questions.explanation: Ek effective schedule client demand ko meet karta hai, staff ki availability ko consider karta hai aur kaam ko fair tarike se distribute karta hai.

questions.question: Team conflict resolve karne ka best tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Open communication aur mediation
options.C: Kisi ek employee ko blame karna

questions.explanation: Open communication aur ek unbiased mediator ki help se conflicts ko effectively resolve kiya ja sakta hai, jisse healthy work environment maintain rehta hai.

questions.question: New hires ko onboard karte waqt kya provide karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Job description, company policies aur detailed training
options.C: Unhe khud se sab seekhne dena

questions.explanation: Proper onboarding mein job description, company policies aur detailed training provide karna zaroori hai taaki naye employees system ko samajh sakein.

questions.question: Staff performance review kyun ki jaati hai?

options.B: Strengths aur weaknesses identify karna aur improvement goals set karna

questions.explanation: Performance reviews employees ke strengths aur weaknesses ko identify karti hain aur unhe improvement ke liye clear goals set karne mein help karti hain.

questions.question: Ek positive work culture kaise banaya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Mutual respect, open communication aur support provide karke

questions.explanation: Mutual respect, open communication aur support ek positive work culture banate hain, jisse employees motivated aur happy rehte hain.

questions.question: Salon mein staff retention improve karne ke liye kya kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Competitive compensation, growth opportunities aur positive work environment

questions.explanation: Competitive compensation, career growth opportunities aur ek positive work environment employees ko retain karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Delegation of tasks ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Manager ko saara kaam karna padta hai
options.B: Staff skills develop hote hain aur manager ka load kam hota hai

questions.explanation: Tasks delegate karne se staff ke skills develop hote hain, unki responsibility badhti hai aur manager ka workload kam hota hai.

questions.question: Salon mein professional development opportunities kyun provide karni chahiye?

options.B: Staff ki expertise badhane aur job satisfaction improve karne ke liye
options.C: Staff ko extra burden dene ke liye
options.D: Competitors ko help karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Professional development opportunities staff ki expertise ko badhati hain, unhe industry trends se update rakhti hain aur unki job satisfaction improve karti hain.

questions.question: Staff meetings ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Information share karna, goals set karna aur team cohesion badhana

questions.explanation: Staff meetings information share karne, team goals set karne aur team cohesion ko strengthen karne ke liye important hain.

questions.question: Salon mein absenteeism aur tardiness ko kaise manage karein?

options.B: Clear policies set karna aur consistency se enforce karna

questions.explanation: Clear policies aur unki consistent enforcement absenteeism aur tardiness ko effectively manage karne mein help karti hai.

questions.question: Salon mein performance-based commission structure ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Sales aur productivity badhana
options.C: Fixed salary se better hota hai
options.D: Sirf manager ko fayda hota hai

questions.explanation: Performance-based commission structure staff ko motivate karta hai, jisse sales aur overall productivity badhti hai.

questions.question: Team bonding activities kyun zaroori hain?

options.B: Team cohesion, communication aur trust build karne ke liye
options.C: Kaam ko delay karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Team bonding activities team cohesion, communication aur trust build karti hain, jisse work environment positive banta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein employee feedback system ka kya role hai?

options.B: Improvement areas identify karna aur employee satisfaction badhana

questions.explanation: Employee feedback system improvement areas identify karta hai, employee satisfaction badhata hai aur unhe valuable feel karwata hai.

questions.question: Salon mein roles aur responsibilities ko clearly define karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Clarity provide karna aur efficiency badhana

questions.explanation: Clear roles aur responsibilities staff ko unka kaam samajhne mein help karte hain, confusion kam karte hain aur overall efficiency badhate hain.

questions.question: Ek salon mein excellent customer service ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Clients ki needs ko samajhna aur unki expectations se zyada deliver karna
options.C: Clients ko jaldi se bahar nikalna

questions.explanation: Excellent customer service clients ki needs ko samajhna aur unki expectations se zyada deliver karna hota hai, jisse woh satisfied hote hain.

questions.question: Client consultation ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Client ki preferences, concerns aur desired results ko samajhna

questions.explanation: Client consultation se stylist client ki preferences, concerns aur desired results ko samajhta hai, jisse best possible service provide ki ja sake.

questions.question: Client complaints ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.B: Dhyaan se sunna, apology dena aur solution offer karna

questions.explanation: Client complaints ko dhyaan se sunna, apology dena aur ek effective solution offer karna client satisfaction maintain karne ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Client loyalty programs ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Repeat business encourage karna aur client retention badhana

questions.explanation: Client loyalty programs repeat business ko encourage karte hain aur client retention rate ko badhate hain, jisse long-term profitability badhti hai.

questions.question: Salon mein waiting time ko kaise manage karein?

options.A: Clients ko bina bataye wait karwana
options.B: Accurate appointment scheduling aur waiting area mein amenities provide karna
options.C: Jaldi se service shuru karna chahe client ready na ho

questions.explanation: Accurate appointment scheduling aur waiting area mein comfortable seating, magazines, Wi-Fi jaise amenities provide karne se waiting time effectively manage hota hai.

questions.question: Client feedback collect karne ka best tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Feedback forms, online reviews aur direct conversations

questions.explanation: Feedback forms, online reviews aur direct conversations ke through client feedback collect karna services ko improve karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein upsell aur cross-sell techniques ka kya role hai?

options.A: Sirf clients ko extra products khareedne ke liye force karna
options.B: Client experience enhance karna aur revenue badhana

questions.explanation: Upsell aur cross-sell techniques clients ko valuable supplementary services ya products provide karke unka experience enhance karti hain aur salon ka revenue badhati hain.

questions.question: Ek salon mein personalized client experience kaise create karein?

options.A: Sab clients ko ek jaisi service dena
options.B: Clients ke names yaad rakhna, unki preferences note karna aur customized recommendations dena
options.C: Sirf naye clients par focus karna

questions.explanation: Clients ke names yaad rakhna, unki preferences note karna aur customized recommendations dena ek personalized experience create karta hai, jisse client loyalty badhti hai.

questions.question: Salon mein client data management ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Client history track karna, personalized marketing aur better service delivery

questions.explanation: Client data management se client history track hoti hai, personalized marketing campaigns bante hain aur better service delivery possible hoti hai.

questions.question: Salon mein positive online reviews ka kya impact hota hai?

options.B: Naye clients ko attract karna aur salon ki reputation badhana

questions.explanation: Positive online reviews naye clients ko attract karte hain aur salon ki overall reputation aur credibility ko badhate hain.

questions.question: Client retention strategy mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.A: Sirf naye clients par focus karna
options.B: Excellent service, loyalty programs aur personalized communication

questions.explanation: Excellent service, effective loyalty programs aur personalized communication client retention ke liye essential strategies hain.

questions.question: Salon mein front desk staff ka kya role hai client experience mein?

options.B: First impression create karna, appointments manage karna aur client queries handle karna

questions.explanation: Front desk staff salon ka first impression hota hai, jo appointments manage karta hai aur client queries handle karke unka experience smooth banata hai.

questions.question: Service recovery ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Client dissatisfaction ko turn around karna aur unhe satisfied karna

questions.explanation: Service recovery ka matlab hai jab koi galti ho jaye toh client dissatisfaction ko turn around karke unhe satisfied karna, jisse loyalty maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Salon mein client comfort ke liye kya provide karna chahiye?

options.B: Comfortable chairs, clean towels, refreshments aur pleasant ambience

questions.explanation: Comfortable chairs, clean towels, refreshments aur pleasant ambience clients ko salon mein comfortable feel karwate hain.

questions.question: Client 'no-shows' ko kam karne ke liye kya effective hai?

options.B: Appointment reminders (SMS/email) aur booking deposit policy

questions.explanation: Appointment reminders aur ek booking deposit policy no-shows ko significantly kam karne mein help karti hai.

questions.question: Ek salon mein 'word-of-mouth' marketing ko kaise boost karein?

options.B: Exceptional service provide karna aur referral programs chalana

questions.explanation: Exceptional service provide karna aur effective referral programs chalana 'word-of-mouth' marketing ko boost karta hai.

questions.question: Client ki privacy aur confidentiality maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Trust build karna aur professional ethics maintain karna

questions.explanation: Client ki privacy aur confidentiality maintain karna trust build karta hai aur professional ethics ko uphold karta hai, jo client relation ke liye fundamental hai.

questions.question: Salon ki branding mein logo ka kya role hai?

options.B: Salon ki identity represent karna aur recognition badhana

questions.explanation: Logo salon ki identity ko represent karta hai aur brand recognition badhane mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Social media marketing salon ke liye kyun important hai?

options.B: Naye clients tak pahunchna aur engagement badhana

questions.explanation: Social media marketing naye clients tak pahunchne, existing clients ke saath engage karne aur salon ki visibility badhane ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Salon ke pricing strategy mein kya consider karna chahiye?

options.B: Operating costs, market value, target audience aur desired profit margin

questions.explanation: Pricing strategy mein operating costs, market value, target audience aur desired profit margin ko consider karna zaroori hai taaki prices competitive aur profitable ho.

questions.question: Salon ke liye effective marketing content mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: High-quality images/videos, client testimonials aur engaging descriptions

questions.explanation: High-quality images/videos, client testimonials aur engaging descriptions effective marketing content banate hain jo clients ko attract karta hai.

questions.question: Local SEO (Search Engine Optimization) salon ke liye kaise faydemand hai?

options.A: Sirf global search results ke liye
options.B: Local area mein online visibility badhana aur nearby clients ko attract karna

questions.explanation: Local SEO salon ki online visibility ko local area mein badhata hai, jisse nearby clients salon ko easily search aur find kar paate hain.

questions.question: Salon ke liye referral program ka kya objective hai?

options.A: Sirf existing clients ko reward karna
options.B: Existing clients ke through naye clients attract karna

questions.explanation: Referral program existing satisfied clients ko encourage karta hai ki woh naye clients ko salon mein refer karein, jisse business badhta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein seasonal promotions kyun launch ki jaati hain?

options.B: Client engagement badhana aur specific seasons mein sales boost karna

questions.explanation: Seasonal promotions client engagement badhati hain aur specific seasons (festivals, holidays) mein sales ko boost karti hain.

questions.question: Salon ki 'Unique Selling Proposition' (USP) kya hoti hai?

options.A: Jo sabhi salons mein common ho
options.B: Jo salon ko competitors se alag banati hai

questions.explanation: USP woh unique feature ya benefit hota hai jo salon ko uske competitors se alag banata hai aur clients ko attract karta hai.

questions.question: Email marketing salon ke liye kaise effective ho sakti hai?

options.B: Personalized offers, appointment reminders aur naye services/products ki updates dena
options.D: Clients ka email address collect na karna

questions.explanation: Email marketing personalized offers, appointment reminders aur naye services/products ki updates bhejkar client engagement aur retention badhati hai.

questions.question: Salon ke website par kya essential elements hone chahiye?

options.B: Service menu, online booking, contact info, gallery aur testimonials

questions.explanation: Ek effective website mein service menu, online booking option, contact info, gallery aur client testimonials hona zaroori hai.

questions.question: Salon mein cross-promotion ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Do ya do se zyada businesses milkar ek dusre ko promote karna

questions.explanation: Cross-promotion mein do ya do se zyada complementary businesses (e.g., salon aur boutique) milkar ek dusre ko promote karte hain, jisse dono ko naye clients milte hain.

questions.question: Salon mein social media campaigns ke liye kis metric ko track karna chahiye?

options.B: Reach, engagement rate, website clicks aur conversion rate

questions.explanation: Reach, engagement rate, website clicks aur conversion rate jaise metrics ko track karna social media campaigns ki effectiveness ko measure karne ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Salon mein public relations (PR) ka kya role hai?

options.B: Salon ki positive image build karna aur media coverage hasil karna

questions.explanation: PR salon ki positive image build karta hai aur media coverage ke through brand visibility aur credibility ko badhata hai.

questions.question: Salon ke marketing budget ko kaise distribute karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf ek channel par spend karna
options.B: Multiple channels (social media, local ads, email) par wisely distribute karna
options.C: Marketing par bilkul kharch na karna
options.D: Sabse mehange channel par spend karna

questions.explanation: Marketing budget ko multiple channels par wisely distribute karna (digital, print, local) se maximum reach aur impact milta hai.

questions.question: Salon ke 'brand voice' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Salon ki personality aur communication style

questions.explanation: Brand voice salon ki personality aur communication style ko define karti hai, jisse woh clients ke saath connect karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein online reviews ka reply dena kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf positive reviews ka reply dena
options.B: Client engagement show karna aur concerns ko address karna
options.D: Sirf negative reviews ka reply dena

questions.explanation: Online reviews ka reply dena client engagement show karta hai, concerns ko address karta hai aur salon ki professionalism ko reflect karta hai.

questions.question: Salon ke marketing efforts ko measure karne ke liye kya tool use karte hain?

options.B: Google Analytics, social media insights aur client surveys

questions.explanation: Google Analytics, social media insights aur client surveys jaise tools marketing efforts ki effectiveness ko measure karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Salon ke liye budget banana kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf extra paise kharch karne ke liye
options.B: Expenses control karna aur financial goals achieve karna

questions.explanation: Budget banana expenses ko control karne aur financial goals ko achieve karne mein help karta hai, jo kisi bhi business ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Salon mein inventory management ka kya objective hai?

options.B: Stock levels optimize karna aur product expiry rokna

questions.explanation: Inventory management stock levels ko optimize karta hai, product expiry aur wastage ko rokta hai, jisse costs control mein rehte hain.

questions.question: Salon ke 'fixed costs' mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Rent, salaries (fixed part), insurance

questions.explanation: Fixed costs woh expenses hote hain jo business activity level se change nahi hote, jaise rent, fixed salaries aur insurance.

questions.question: Salon ke 'variable costs' mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Product consumption per client, commission-based salaries, utility bills

questions.explanation: Variable costs woh expenses hote hain jo business activity level ke saath change hote hain, jaise product consumption, commission aur utility bills.

questions.question: Profit and Loss (P&L) statement ka kya use hai?

options.B: Salon ki financial performance (revenue, expenses, profit) ko track karna

questions.explanation: P&L statement salon ki financial performance ko ek specific period mein show karti hai, jisme revenue, expenses aur net profit ya loss shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Cash flow management kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Salon ke paas hamesha sufficient funds hon, yeh ensure karna

questions.explanation: Cash flow management ensure karta hai ki salon ke paas bills pay karne aur operations chalane ke liye hamesha sufficient cash ho.

questions.question: Salon ke liye supplier relations manage karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf ek supplier se deal karna
options.B: Best prices, quality products aur timely delivery ensure karna

questions.explanation: Good supplier relations best prices, quality products aur timely delivery ensure karti hain, jo salon operations ke liye essential hain.

questions.question: Salon software ka kya fayda hai financial management mein?

options.B: Sales tracking, expense management, payroll aur reporting ko automate karna

questions.explanation: Salon software financial management ko streamline karta hai, sales tracking, expense management, payroll aur reporting ko automate karke efficiency badhata hai.

questions.question: Salon mein product pricing kaise set ki jaati hai?

options.B: Cost of goods, desired profit margin aur market rates ko consider karke

questions.explanation: Product pricing set karte waqt cost of goods, desired profit margin aur market rates ko consider karna zaroori hai taaki woh profitable aur competitive ho.

questions.question: Salon ke liye bank loan lete waqt kis factor ko sabse zyada importance deni chahiye?

options.B: Interest rate, repayment terms aur hidden charges

questions.explanation: Bank loan lete waqt interest rate, repayment terms aur hidden charges ko carefully evaluate karna chahiye taaki future mein koi financial burden na ho.

questions.question: Salon mein theft aur pilferage rokne ke liye kya steps le sakte hain?

options.B: Regular inventory checks, CCTV surveillance aur access control

questions.explanation: Regular inventory checks, CCTV surveillance aur access control theft aur pilferage ko rokne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Salon ke financial records maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Tax compliance, business performance analysis aur future planning

questions.explanation: Accurate financial records tax compliance, business performance analysis aur future planning ke liye essential hain.

questions.question: Break-even point ka kya matlab hai salon business mein?

options.B: Jab total revenue total costs ke barabar ho, na profit na loss

questions.explanation: Break-even point woh level hai jahan total revenue total costs ke barabar hota hai, matlab na profit hota hai aur na hi loss.

questions.question: Salon mein petty cash management kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Small, day-to-day expenses ko track karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Petty cash management small, day-to-day expenses ko track karne aur control karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein credit card payments accept karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Client convenience badhana aur sales increase karna

questions.explanation: Credit card payments accept karne se client convenience badhti hai aur overall sales increase hoti hain.

questions.question: Salon mein product expiry dates ko kaise manage karein?

options.B: FIFO (First-In, First-Out) method use karna aur regularly check karna

questions.explanation: FIFO method use karna aur regularly expiry dates check karna product wastage ko rokta hai aur ensure karta hai ki fresh products use ho.

questions.question: Salon mein health and safety regulations follow karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf fine se bachne ke liye
options.B: Staff aur clients ki safety ensure karna aur legal compliance maintain karna

questions.explanation: Health and safety regulations follow karna staff aur clients ki safety ensure karta hai aur legal compliance maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Salon ke liye public liability insurance kyun important hai?

options.B: Clients ko hone wale accidental injuries ya property damage ke liye cover provide karna

questions.explanation: Public liability insurance clients ko hone wale accidental injuries ya property damage ke claims se salon ko protect karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein fire safety measures mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Fire extinguishers, smoke detectors, emergency exits aur fire drills

questions.explanation: Fire extinguishers, smoke detectors, clearly marked emergency exits aur regular fire drills fire safety ke essential measures hain.

questions.question: Salon mein chemical storage ke liye kya guidelines hain?

options.A: Sab chemicals ko ek saath rakhna
options.B: Properly labeled containers mein store karna, ventilation area mein aur children ki reach se door

questions.explanation: Chemicals ko properly labeled containers mein, well-ventilated area mein aur children ki reach se door store karna safety ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Salon mein employee rights aur labour laws ka dhyaan rakhna kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf employees ko zyada benefits dene ke liye
options.B: Legal issues se bachna aur positive work environment maintain karna

questions.explanation: Employee rights aur labour laws ka dhyaan rakhna legal issues se bachata hai aur ek positive, fair work environment maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein first aid kit ka hona kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Minor injuries ko immediately treat karna

questions.explanation: First aid kit minor injuries aur emergencies ko immediately treat karne ke liye essential hai, jo workplace safety ka part hai.

questions.question: Salon mein client data privacy (e.g., GDPR/local laws) ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Client data ko freely share karna
options.B: Client ki personal information ko secure rakhna aur unki permission se use karna

questions.explanation: Client data privacy ka matlab hai client ki personal information ko secure rakhna aur usse sirf unki explicit permission se use karna, as per legal requirements.

questions.question: Salon mein occupational safety and health (OSH) guidelines ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Workplace hazards ko identify aur control karna, staff safety ensure karna

questions.explanation: OSH guidelines workplace hazards ko identify aur control karti hain, jisse staff ki safety aur health ensure hoti hai.

questions.question: Salon mein staff ke liye personal protective equipment (PPE) kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Chemical exposure aur infections se protect karna

questions.explanation: PPE (gloves, masks, aprons) staff ko harmful chemicals, infections aur other workplace hazards se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein electrical equipment ki regular safety checks kyun zaroori hain?

options.A: Sirf naya equipment khareedne ke liye
options.B: Electrical hazards (shocks, fires) ko rokna

questions.explanation: Regular safety checks electrical equipment mein faults ko detect karte hain, jisse electrical hazards jaise shocks aur fires se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein building code compliance ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Building structure, safety features aur accessibility requirements ko follow karna

questions.explanation: Building code compliance ka matlab hai building structure, safety features (fire exits, ventilation) aur accessibility requirements ko follow karna.

questions.question: Salon mein hazardous waste disposal ke liye kya guidelines hain?

options.B: Specific containers mein collect karna aur authorized agencies ke through dispose karna

questions.explanation: Hazardous waste (chemicals, sharps) ko specific containers mein collect karna aur authorized agencies ke through dispose karna environmental safety ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Salon mein anti-discrimination policies kyun zaroori hain?

options.B: Fair treatment ensure karna aur harassment rokna

questions.explanation: Anti-discrimination policies workplace mein fair treatment ensure karti hain aur harassment ko rokti hain, jisse sabhi employees ke liye respectful environment banta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein emergency contact information accessible rakhna kyun important hai?

options.B: Emergencies mein quick response ke liye

questions.explanation: Emergency contact information accessible rakhna emergencies mein quick response aur necessary help provide karne ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Salon mein consent forms (e.g., for chemical treatments) ka kya role hai?

options.B: Client ko treatment risks ke baare mein inform karna aur legal protection provide karna

questions.explanation: Consent forms client ko treatment ke risks ke baare mein inform karte hain aur salon ko legal protection provide karte hain.

questions.question: Salon mein 'no smoking' policy kyun enforce ki jaati hai?

options.B: Health hazards rokna aur fire safety maintain karna

questions.explanation: No smoking policy health hazards ko rokti hai aur salon mein fire safety maintain karti hai, jo public health aur safety ke liye important hai.
